attacking_style: Launches sustained solo attacks 15-45km from finish, often on penultimate climbs or technical descents, building gaps through repeated accelerations rather than single explosive moves. Increasingly attacks final 1.5-3km on steep gradients (14-20%) when closer sprint finishes are possible.
team_tactics: UAE sets aggressive tempo from distance to isolate rivals, but Pogacar frequently attacks alone without immediate support. Team prioritizes his bonus second collection even when teammates hold GC positions. Domestique support weakens in third week of Grand Tours.
terrain_preference: Excels on short explosive climbs (1.5-8km at 10%+), technical descents with multiple hairpins, and surprisingly dominant on cobbles/gravel. Struggles emerge only in multi-week attrition scenarios. TTT and flat TT strength creates early GC advantages.
vulnerability: Third-week Grand Tour collapses when facing sustained rival pressure (2022 TdF: lost 3+ minutes, 2023 TdF: 6-minute implosion after crash). Unable to distance Vingegaard in final kilometers despite repeated 2022-2023 attacks. Wrist injuries from crashes compromise descending confidence.
key_patterns: Attacks 15-50km from finish on penultimate climbs, building solo gaps through sustained power (8+ observations)
Hunts bonus seconds aggressively at intermediate sprints even when leading GC, accumulating micro-gains (5 observations)
Wins Monuments via repeated accelerations to guarantee solo finish rather than risk sprint (4 Monument wins)
Cracks dramatically in third week under sustained GC pressure: 3min and 6min losses 2022-2023 Tours
Demonstrates exceptional same-race recovery: attacks next day after losses, cramping, or crashes (6+ observations)
Operates increasingly isolated in finale without teammates, especially late Grand Tours and 2023 Tour
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 Tour showed unprecedented vulnerability—lost yellow early, couldn't distance Vingegaard despite repeated attacks, suffered 6-minute collapse after crash, required Yates assistance. Post-Tour stage hunting from 7+ minutes down suggests psychological need to salvage season. Wrist fracture at Liege further disrupted 2023 campaign.
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 12
2023 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
2023 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
